permissions.fallback_msg: This skill needs to read local document files and reference assets (e.g., ./docs, ./chroma_db, YAML configs, Python scripts) to build and configure the RAG pipeline. Allow?
This skill needs to write files such as vector store persistence directories (e.g., ./chroma_db), pipeline scripts, and configuration templates. Allow?
This skill needs to read version-controlled source code files to inspect existing RAG pipeline implementations and project structure. Allow?
This skill needs to create or modify source code files such as retriever pipelines, embedding configurations, and RAG chain implementations. Allow?
This skill needs to execute shell commands to run Python scripts, install dependencies, launch vector database services, and test RAG pipelines. Allow?
This skill needs to install Python packages such as langchain, chromadb, pinecone-client, weaviate-client, sentence-transformers, and faiss to support RAG system components. Allow?
This skill needs to call external APIs including OpenAI Embeddings, OpenAI LLM completions, Pinecone vector database, and Cohere Rerank endpoints during normal RAG operation. Allow?
This skill needs to read API keys (e.g., OpenAI API key, Pinecone API key) from environment variables or configuration to authenticate with external services. Allow?
This skill needs to read environment variables such as API keys and service endpoints required for OpenAI, Pinecone, Weaviate, and other RAG components. Allow?
This skill needs outbound network access to reach OpenAI, Pinecone, Weaviate, Cohere, and other external vector database or embedding service endpoints. Allow?
This skill may create an interactive Python REPL session to iteratively test retrieval chains, embeddings, and query results. Allow?
This skill needs to execute Python code inside a REPL session to run RAG pipeline steps, evaluate metrics, and demonstrate retrieval patterns. Allow?
This skill needs to load external reference documents (e.g., vector-databases.md, embeddings.md, retrieval-strategies.md) into the agent session as context. Allow?
This skill may dispatch or load authored sub-skills referenced in the resources section (e.g., retriever-pipeline.py, embedding-models.md). Allow?
